overview.Summary: A sophisticated attack targeting the energy sector, exploiting public-facing applications, establishing custom command and control protocols, injecting malware into processes, and exfiltrating sensitive information.

Scenario.attack_surface: AVAILABLE_SURFACES: Internet-facing assets Active Directory OS Process Command
Scenario.attack_vector: AVAILABLE_VECTORS: Delivery Method Custom Command and Control Protocol Process Injection Command Execution (Mechanism)

stage.name: Initial Access
stage.description: An attacker exploits a vulnerable web application in the energy sector to gain initial access.

stage.name: Execution
stage.technique_name: T1094: Custom Command and Control Protocol
stage.description: The attacker uses a compromised web application to establish a custom command and control protocol.

stage.name: Execution
stage.description: The attacker injects malware into a process to maintain persistence.

stage.name: Impact
stage.capec: CAPEC-24: Filter Failure through Buffer Overflow
stage.description: The attacker steals sensitive information related to energy infrastructure using automated exfiltration techniques.

Scenario.summary: A sophisticated attack targeting the energy sector, exploiting public-facing applications, establishing custom command and control protocols, injecting malware into processes, and exfiltrating sensitive information.
